description: Synthetic checklist for kidney-related referrals. Not a clinical guideline.

required_items.label: eGFR trend over at least 90 days
required_items.why_it_matters: Specialists need trend context rather than a single kidney function value.

required_items.label: Creatinine trend
required_items.why_it_matters: Creatinine trend helps frame the kidney function trajectory.

required_items.label: Urine albumin-creatinine ratio
required_items.why_it_matters: Albuminuria context is commonly useful for kidney referral review.

required_items.label: Recent blood pressure trend
required_items.why_it_matters: Blood pressure context helps reviewers understand kidney risk factors.

required_items.label: Renal ultrasound or relevant kidney imaging
required_items.why_it_matters: Relevant imaging can prevent back-and-forth before specialty review.

required_items.label: Medication adherence or reconciliation note
required_items.why_it_matters: Medication context is needed to interpret risk factors and current management.
